public_option_scope.description: Start exercising according to the written daily schedule.
Defer the start and recheck cooperation among the minds.

uncertainty: The protective action direction is clear; the deeper motive remains a bounded hypothesis.

visible_observations.perceived_value_json: {"visible_description":"The planned exercise is represented, but an attractive target scene of doing it is absent and starting has low attraction."}
{"visible_description":"There is a clear protective impulse not to force the start and to hold execution for now."}
